title: Anthropic was the Pentagon's choice for AI. Now it's banned and experts are worried
summary_full: Anthropic's partnerships with Amazon and Palantir helped it make inroads into the DOD, and its blacklisting is concerning to many industry experts.
summary_public: Anthropic's partnerships with Amazon and Palantir helped it make inroads into the DOD, and its blacklisting is concerning to many industry experts.
